title: Docent conformance vector
description: Structural contract for an inert conformance vector under docs/locator-resolution.md (Conformance and Vector Scope). A vector is committed data: a recorded element's locator candidates and its non-locator facts, a serialized snapshot of the bound scope at the moment the element was described, the ground-truth node inside that snapshot, and the per-candidate node ids each candidate's stated query selects over the snapshot. The .docent.json contract (schemas/) governs the shape of element_facts and locators; this meta-schema governs the vector envelope only.

vector_id.description: Stable identifier for this vector, unique within the corpus.

platform.description: The Docent platform whose strategy table and bound scope this vector is stated under.

spec.description: The specification the vector is stated under.

scope.description: The bound scope the snapshot serializes, per the platform's stated measurement scope.

frame_src.description: The capturing frame's URL; null for the top frame.

element_facts.description: The recorded element object with its nested locators removed: the non-locator fact source. Deep validity is governed by the .docent.json schema for the platform, not restated here.

locators.description: The recorded locator candidate array for the ground-truth element, verbatim from the session capture. Per-entry field shapes are governed by the .docent.json schema.

tree_snapshot.description: The serialized subtree of the bound scope, captured at the moment the element was described. The node shape is platform-specific — an extension DOM node (see $defs/node) or a desktop UIA node (see $defs/desktop_node) — selected by `platform` in the conditional below. Canonical: keys/attributes in a fixed order, children in document / Control-view order.

node_id.description: The node_id of the acted-on element inside tree_snapshot.

matched_node_ids.description: Parallel to locators, one entry per candidate: the node_ids the candidate's stated query selects over tree_snapshot, in document order; null for a candidate ineligible as a selector (masked, or match_index null).

expected_outcome.description: Only expected_outcome resolved vectors are published (the inclusion criterion members).

node_id.description: Snapshot-local identifier, assigned in document order.

tag.description: The element's tag as captured (DOM tagName; upper-case for HTML).

attrs.description: The closed set of attributes the emitted strategy queries and the label relation consult; present keys only.

text.description: The node's visible text in the trim-only, 100-char element.text form; null when empty.

desktop_node.description: A serialized node of the desktop UI Automation Control view. The bound scope is the acted-on top-level window (the window itself included), walked in Control-view order. control_type / automation_id / class_name / structure are kept verbatim (stable, count-relevant); the localized Name of any node that does NOT carry an authored content automation_id is normalized to the reserved placeholder, so the committed snapshot does not freeze OS-locale strings.

node_id.description: Snapshot-local identifier, assigned in Control-view (depth-first pre-order) order.

control_type.description: The node's non-localized UIA control type name, e.g. "Edit", "Button", "Window" — the same value the platform records as element.tag and role_name.role.

name.description: The node's UIA Name; the reserved placeholder for OS-provided (non-authored) nodes, null when the provider reports none.

automation_id.description: The node's UIA AutomationId; null when the provider reports none.

class_name.description: The node's UIA ClassName; null when the provider reports none.

text.description: The node's visible text (value), 100-capped; null for OS-provided nodes and password fields. Consulted only for corroboration of the ground-truth node, never as a selection query.

labeled_by.description: The LabeledBy relation edge, so the labeled_by query (elements whose label relation resolves to an element named value) is evaluable over the snapshot; null when the node has no label relation.

target_node_id.description: The node_id of the label element inside this snapshot, when it is present in the walked scope.

target_name.description: The UIA Name of the label element (the value a labeled_by candidate carries).
